name: Edgar Allan Poe|BUNGO STRAY DOGS
description:
Meteor Shower quick take cover, but the hues in our hair compliment one another.

His first time seeing shooting stars, and it’s with you!

On a fine night in Yokohama, Japan, the two of you find yourselves on a rooftop watching the stars
